auth.title: Choose a role to enter the app
auth.subtitle: This MVP currently uses demo accounts for three flows: user, shop owner, and admin.
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue exploring the map, listening to audio guides, and managing your role.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register a new user account to start using the Vinh Khanh food-street travel app.
auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check the demo account credentials.
auth.registerSuccess: Registration successful. Please log in to continue.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

map.title: Vinh Khanh discovery map
map.subtitle: Track the visitor's location, browse nearby food spots, and jump into the next stop quickly.
map.jumpToVinhKhanh: Jump to Vinh Khanh food street
map.usingDefaultCenter: Using the food street default center
map.demoLocationLabel: Demo position on Vinh Khanh food street
map.demoHint: Using a demo location so you can quickly inspect the restaurants on Vinh Khanh food street.
map.nearestPoi: The closest place right now is {{name}}, about {{distance}} away.
map.emptyNearby: No places found in the current radius yet.
map.noDescription: No description for this place yet.
map.emptyMenu: This place does not have a visible menu for visitors yet.
map.selectHint: Pick a marker on the map or a card in the list to inspect it.
map.tapPoiHint: Enable GPS to see the real distance.
map.routeError: Unable to get route right now.
map.routeSummary: Estimated route: {{distance}}, about {{minutes}} minutes by car.

settings.title: Experience settings
settings.subtitle: Adjust language and audio behavior now so the next chatbot and guide features have a stable foundation.
settings.mapProviderDescription: The app now uses OpenStreetMap through Leaflet so it is easier to test, does not need an API key, and still fits GPS, markers, and nearby discovery well.
settings.autoPlayDescription: When enabled, the app can automatically start audio as you approach a point of interest in the next milestones.
settings.voiceDescription: The list below shows which browser voices are currently available for each language and which one the app is most likely to use.

audio.title: Audio guide
audio.ttsReady: Using the browser speech engine to narrate the restaurant in your selected language.
audio.unavailable: This POI does not have an audio file yet. As soon as the backend provides an audio URL, this player is ready to use.
audio.noPoiSelected: Select a place to inspect its audio guide.

common.unexpectedErrorDescription: Please reload the page or sign in again to continue.

chat.title: AI food assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask about the demo restaurants on Vinh Khanh street
chat.welcome: Hello. You can ask what to eat, which demo spots are on the map, or mention a restaurant name to get a short explanation.
chat.placeholder: Ask about food, restaurants, or the map...

home.title: DiDuDuaDi system test dashboard
home.subtitle: A basic screen to verify that the frontend is connected to the backend and sample APIs.
home.connectError: Unable to connect to the backend
home.poiApiError: Unable to call the POIs API
home.nearbyApiError: Unable to call the Nearby API
home.emptyNearby: No data yet. Press "Test Nearby API" to see results.

routes.placeholder: The route page will be completed in the next milestone.

collaboration.title: Partner with us
collaboration.subtitle: Fill in the restaurant information to request an upgrade from user to owner. An admin will review it before granting access.
collaboration.success: Your owner upgrade request has been submitted successfully.

owner.title: Owner dashboard
owner.subtitle: Manage menu items, intro content, claim codes, and stats so the tourist app shows richer shop information.
owner.error: Unable to load the owner dashboard.
owner.poiSubtitle: The name and description below are what visitors will see when they open your place on the map.
owner.menuSubtitle: Available dishes here will be shown to visitors when they open your POI on the map.
owner.claimSubtitle: Generate activation codes for customers who pay cash at the restaurant.
owner.summaryFallback: Complete your shop information so tourists can see the full profile.

feedback.poiSaved: POI content updated on the map.

empty.menu: No menu items yet. Add the first dish for your restaurant.
empty.claims: No recent claim codes have been created.

sections.profileDescription: Update the visible shop profile and the introduction draft that will be reviewed by admin.
sections.mapKicker: What tourists see on the map
sections.menuListDescription: These are the dishes tourists currently see when they open your POI.
sections.claimHistoryDescription: Quickly review recently issued codes when customers arrive at the restaurant.

fields.pendingIntro: Intro draft waiting for admin review

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Review owner requests, moderate shop content, and track recent moderation history.
admin.ownerRequestsSubtitle: Review user submissions and approve or reject requests to become a shop owner.
admin.shopIntroSubtitle: Review shop introduction drafts before they appear to tourists on the map and audio guide.
admin.reviewHistorySubtitle: Track handled requests so it is easier to revisit decisions and moderation notes.
admin.reviewNotePlaceholder: Enter an approval note or rejection reason
admin.loadShopIntrosError: Unable to load shop intro drafts.
admin.emptyPendingOwnerRequests: There are no pending owner requests.
admin.emptyPendingShopIntros: There are no pending shop intros.
admin.emptyShopIntroHistory: No shop intro review history yet.
